title: pinus mayriana
intro: Pinus mayriana, also known as Mayri's pine, is a species of pine tree native to Yunnan Province in China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Pinus mayriana typically involve steaming the needles to release their oils, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams.
